title: [packit] Propose downstream failed for release v4.7.0-rc1
body:
Packit failed on creating pull-requests in dist-git (https://src.fedoraproject.org/rpms/podman.git):

| dist-git branch | error |
| --------------- | ----- |
| `f37` | See https://dashboard.packit.dev/results/propose-downstream/3859 |
| `f38` | See https://dashboard.packit.dev/results/propose-downstream/3858 |
| `f39` | See https://dashboard.packit.dev/results/propose-downstream/3860 |
| `rawhide` | See https://dashboard.packit.dev/results/propose-downstream/3857 |


You can retrigger the update by adding a comment (`/packit propose-downstream`) into this issue.

comments.body: packit doesn't work well with RCs. Will manually update once the current bodhis for 4.6.2 are addressed.
